organize_and_query: us Organize files by type and by month, then answer three questions about the contents using compact parse artifacts (no full_text). Prefer ask for broad queries and ask_about_file for specific PDFs by name.
semantic_search: us Demonstrate semantic search on the sample set. Find documents about policy/security, and show the top-3 related files for each query.
tables_and_spreadsheets: us Locate spreadsheets and CSVs, extract key columns, and summarize table counts using compact parse references.
